key_risks: Hot May CPI (June 10) triggers hawkish repricing hurting growth/semis
Gold reverses on stronger dollar or risk-on rotation
Defense budget reconciliation delays cap ITA upside
Momentum factor crash on sudden rotation to value/defensives

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex acceleration, Q1 global chip sales +25% QoQ.
Hedge against re-accelerating inflation (CPI 3.8%, PPI 6%), weak sentiment, geopolitical risk.
$1.5T FY27 defense budget tailwind, strong momentum.
Persistent momentum factor leadership in low-vol regime (VIX 15.7).
Dry powder given stagflation risk: GDP revised down to 1.6%, CPI re-accelerating, consumer sentiment collapsing to 44.8.

portfolio_rationale: Barbell: AI/semis and defense momentum leadership paired with gold hedge against stagflation signals (hot CPI/PPI, GDP downgrade, sentiment crash). Short Treasuries reduce drawdown risk into June FOMC.
rationale_summary: Overweight AI/semis and defense for momentum continuation; gold and bills hedge stagflationary macro and weak consumer signals before June 17 FOMC.
